title: Done column is sorted by last-updated descending
description:
Issues in any column whose status belongs to the Done category are always displayed with the most recently updated issue at the top. This ordering is fixed and not user-configurable — it is an unconditional product decision.

## Rationale

Done work is done. The only useful question about the Done column is "what just landed?" — which requires recency-first ordering. FIFO discipline applies to active work; once something is done it no longer participates in flow management.

Scenario: Done column shows most recently updated issue first

Given several issues are in the Done column with different updated_at timestamps
When the user views the kanban board
Then the issue with the latest updated_at timestamp appears at the top of the Done column
And issues are ordered from most recently updated to least recently updated going downward

Scenario: A newly completed issue appears at the top

Given the Done column has existing issues
When a new issue is moved to Done
Then it appears at the top of the Done column immediately
Because its updated_at timestamp is now the most recent

Scenario: Reopening and re-closing an issue brings it back to the top

Given an issue was closed some time ago and is not at the top of Done
When that issue is reopened and then closed again
Then it returns to the top of the Done column
Because its updated_at has been refreshed

Scenario: Done column sort is not affected by sort_order configuration

Given a sort_order configuration is defined in .kanbus.yml for the closed status
Then that configuration is ignored for the Done column
And the Done column continues to sort by last-updated descending

Scenario: Collapsed Done column preserves the same order when expanded

Given the Done column is collapsed
When the user expands it
Then the issues are still ordered by last-updated descending
And the most recently updated issue is at the top
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented console board ordering override: statuses in Done category are always sorted by updated_at descending in Board.tsx, independent of selected sort preset.
